title: Growth Energy Amicus Brief Points Toward EPAâ€™s Lost Opportunity on Biofuels
content: Growth Energy, the nationâ€™s largest biofuel trade association, filed an amicus brief today in a case in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit challenging the U.S. Environmental Protection Agencyâ€™s (EPA) Multi-Pollutant Emissions Standards for Model Years 2027 and Later Light-Duty and Medium-Duty Vehicles, otherwise known as the â€œtailpipe emissions rule.â€ In the amicus brief, Growth Energy noted that EPAâ€™s rule was a missed opportunity to recognize the positive impact biofuels can have on reducing tailpipe emissions.
author: Analysts Account
